summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CreatorStudio AI application. All core features working correctly: user registration (54 free credits), login, reel generation, demo generator, pricing page, contact form, reviews page, upgrade modal, and logout.

minor.issue: Products were not showing due to Redis cache - cleared cache and products now display correctly

seed_data_creation: Seeded 5 products (3 credit packs, 2 subscriptions) into products table
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) New users get 54 free credits on signup (verified via API and UI), 2) Login/logout works correctly, 3) Dashboard shows credit balance and generation counts, 4) Reel Generator form works - generates hooks, best hook, script scenes, captions, hashtags, 5) Copy All and Download buttons work, 6) Free tier watermark banner displays for non-paying users, 7) Upgrade modal appears when free user tries to download, 8) Demo reel generator works without auth (includes watermark), 9) Pricing page displays all products (subscriptions and credit packs), 10) Contact form submission works, 11) Reviews page displays correctly with default reviews, 12) Navigation between pages works correctly. Note: Products table was empty initially - seeded 5 products. Redis cache was causing products to not show - cleared cache to fix.
